title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NIIT Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
